content.speakerText: I should head out soon—this was such a great night.
content.speakerTextCn: 我该走了，今晚聊得太开心了。

options.text: Same here! Can’t wait for Sunday—have a safe trip home!
Yeah, I’m tired too. Let’s just end it.
Fine, go ahead. I don’t care.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了积极、温暖的语气，呼应了对方的情感并表达了期待再会，符合‘温馨道别’场景。选项2虽礼貌但缺乏情感共鸣；选项3语气消极，破坏氛围；选项4冷漠无礼，完全不符合场景要求。

content.speakerText: It’s getting late—I really enjoyed hanging out with you tonight.
content.speakerTextCn: 时间不早了，今晚和你相处真的很开心。

options.text: Same here! Let’s do this again soon—drive safe!
I guess I should go now.

content.explanation: 正确答案不仅表达了共鸣（Same here!），还使用了积极的未来期待（Let’s do this again soon）和关心的结束语（drive safe），完整体现温馨道别。选项2虽然正确但过于简短，缺乏情感温度；选项3和4语气被动或冷漠，不符合‘留下好印象’的目标。

content.speakerText: I’ve had such a wonderful time—thanks for making tonight special.
content.speakerTextCn: 我度过了非常美好的时光，谢谢你让今晚如此特别。

options.text: Aww, thank you! I’m so glad you enjoyed it—take care and text me tomorrow!
Yeah, I guess I should get going.

content.explanation: 正确答案用温暖的回应（Aww, thank you!）肯定了对方的情感，同时表达了关心（take care）和未来联结（text me tomorrow），符合温馨道别的核心。选项2过于轻描淡写，削弱了情感价值；选项3和4未回应对方的情感表达，显得敷衍。

content.template: Same here! Can’t wait for Sunday—have a safe trip ___!
content.hint: 告别时表达‘安全回家’的常用搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：have a safe trip home

content.template: I really enjoyed tonight—let’s ___ again soon!
content.hint: 表达‘再一起聚聚’的自然口语表达
content.knowledgePoint: 动词短语搭配：hang out（非正式聚会）

content.template: Thanks for coming—it meant a lot to me. ___ you tomorrow!
content.hint: 轻松结尾时常用的动作，带表情符号更自然
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频动词：text（非正式沟通）

content.speakerText: I should head out soon—this was such a great night.
content.speakerTextCn: 我该走了，今晚聊得太开心了。
expectedAnswers: Same here! Have a safe trip home 😊
I loved tonight too—let’s do this again soon!
Thanks for being such a great company. Drive safely and text me when you get home!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了共鸣和关心
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化、温暖的语气
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个场景关键词如 'safe trip', 'text', 'again soon'

content.speakerText: It’s getting late—I had such a wonderful time with you.
content.speakerTextCn: 时间不早了，我和你度过了非常美好的时光。
expectedAnswers: Same! I’m already looking forward to next time. Take care!
Thank you so much—tonight was perfect. Don’t forget to send me a photo tomorrow!
I’m so glad we got to spend this time together. Safe travels and talk soon!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了情感并传递温暖
语言准确性：是否避免生硬或语法错误表达
表达自然度：是否使用了符合英语母语者习惯的口语结构
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个情感关键词如 'wonderful time', 'look forward', 'safe travels'

content.speakerText: I should go—this has been such a lovely evening.
content.speakerTextCn: 我该走了，今晚真是一段美好的时光。
expectedAnswers: It really has! I’ll miss you already—text me when you’re home 😊
Same here! You made the night so special. Take care and see you soon!
Thank you for being here. I’m already planning our next coffee date!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了感谢、共鸣与未来期待
语言准确性：是否正确使用时态、介词和短语搭配
表达自然度：是否避免机械重复，体现个性化回应
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个情感表达词如 'lovely evening', 'special', 'next time'
